title: White Solid Polystyrene Foam Eggs Styrofoam, 120mm (12cm) - Pack of 5 - Suitable for School DIY Craft Projects, Art, Crafts, Home, School Projects, Party Decorations, Painting DIY, Christmas, Xmas
features: Versatile: White solid polystyrene foam eggs, 120mm (4.7 inches) in diameter, ideal for school DIY craft projects, art, crafts, home decor, party decorations, painting, and more.
Quantity: Pack of 5 styrofoam eggs, providing ample material for various creative endeavours.
Lightweight and Durable: Made from high-quality polystyrene foam, ensuring a sturdy yet lightweight construction.
Smooth Surface: The eggs feature a smooth surface, perfect for painting, decorating, and embellishing.
Multipurpose: Suitable for a wide range of occasions, including Christmas, Halloween, and other festive celebrations.
description: Unleash your creativity with these versatile white solid polystyrene foam eggs! Perfect for a wide range of DIY projects, these styrofoam eggs measure 120mm (12cm) in size and come in a pack of 5. Whether you're planning school projects, art and crafts, home decor, party decorations, or even painting for Christmas and Halloween, these eggs provide a blank canvas for your imagination. Their lightweight and durable nature make them easy to work with, allowing you to cut, shape, and decorate them as desired. Suitable for both adults and children, these polystyrene eggs offer endless possibilities for artistic expression and creative endeavours. Embrace your inner artist and let your creativity soar with these versatile foam eggs!
